notes: Captured post fuel system wave-end fix: PowertrainOutput now surfaces engine_power_demand_w directly (pre-cap, pre-η, pre-ERS), replacing a faulty post-cap inversion in mod.rs. The corrected demand is ~15% higher than the inversion result, so the FIA fuel-flow cap bites harder. 0-100 3.38 → 3.46s, DRS 200-300 6.48 → 6.59s, lat-g shifts +1% in oil/wet (less ICE drag from FIA cap during corner exit). Live mass 868 kg.
